case_title: MITCHELL, THOMAS R et al VS TISHGART, KENNETH B

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLFT HELEN DAINES MITCHELL FILED AND ENTERED ONLY.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-20-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-25-2004 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER TRIAL.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-25-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-29-2004 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR AND CHALLENGES VENUE. VENUE IS PROPER. CONTINUED FOR FURTHER TRIAL.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-29-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-07-2005 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFT TO PUT DISPUTED AMT OF ATTY'S FEES INTO A SEGREGATED AMT & FACILITATE PYMT TO PLTF SMITH, MARGINE OF UNDISPUTED SETTLEMENT FUNDS. BOTH PLTF MITCHELL, THOMAS R. & DEFT TISHGART, KENNETH B.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-07-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-07-2005 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT ON PYMT TO PLTF SMITH, MARGINE OF UNDISPUTED SETTLEMENT FUNDS AND PLTF MITCHELL, THOMAS R. & DEFT TISHGART, KENNETH B. PARTICIPATION IN BASF'S ATTORNEY TO ATTORNEY FEE
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-09-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-06-2005 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED FOR FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT TISHGART, KENNETH B PROGRESS REPORT OFF-CALENDARED. PLTF SMITH, MARGINE HAS RECEIVED HER SHARE OF THE UNDISPUTED PORTION OF THE SETTLEMENT CHECK. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL SENT TO KENNETH TISHGART RETURNED SIGNED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-06-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-11-2005 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR FINAL PROGRESS REPORT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MITCHELL, THOMAS R SMITH, MARGINE AS TO DEFENDANT TISHGART, KENNETH B ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-2004 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ARE ORDERED TO PARTICIPATE IN THE BASF ATTORNEY TO ATTORNEY FEE DISPUTE PROGRAM. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT.
ARE ORDERED TO PARTICIPATE IN THE BASF ATTORNEY TO ATTORNEY FEE DISPUTE PROGRAM. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-07-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-04-2005 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PLAINTIFF SMITH, MARGINE CAN APPEAR BY TELEPHONE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-04-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-09-2005 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT. PLTF - SMITH, MARGINE CAN APPEAR BY TELEPHONE.
